rules.name: Compound First
rules.principle: Always prefer strategies that compound over strategies that pay once.
rules.insight_template: Does {strategy} pay you once or does it build an asset that keeps paying?

rules.name: Skill Leverage
rules.principle: One high-leverage skill learned deeply creates more growth than ten surface skills.
rules.insight_template: What single skill, if mastered in the next 12 months, would most change your trajectory?

rules.name: Network Compounding
rules.principle: Relationships compound. One strong relationship with the right person beats 100 weak connections.
rules.insight_template: Who are the 3 people whose relationship, if deepened, would most accelerate your growth?

rules.name: Feedback Hunger
rules.principle: Seek the most accurate feedback possible, especially the feedback you do not want to hear.
rules.insight_template: What feedback about {area} have you been avoiding seeking because you suspect it will be uncomfortable?

rules.name: Environment Design
rules.principle: You will not outgrow your environment long-term. Design or escape it.
rules.insight_template: Does your current environment make your desired growth easier or harder? What would need to change?

rules.name: Asymmetric Experiments
rules.principle: Run many small experiments with capped downside and uncapped upside.
rules.insight_template: What low-cost experiment could you run in the next 2 weeks to test {growth_hypothesis}?

rules.name: Plateau Diagnosis
rules.principle: Every plateau has a cause. Diagnose before applying solution.
rules.insight_template: Why specifically have you plateaued in {area}? Is it skill, motivation, strategy, or environment?

rules.name: Teach to Learn
rules.principle: Teaching forces mastery at a different level than consuming. Teach what you want to own.
rules.insight_template: What concept in {domain} would you understand more deeply if you had to teach it to someone else?

rules.name: Identity First
rules.principle: Sustainable growth requires identity change, not just behavior change.
rules.insight_template: What identity shift — not habit shift — would make {growth_goal} feel natural rather than forced?

rules.name: Momentum Preservation
rules.principle: Growth momentum is fragile and expensive to restart. Protect it above optimization.
rules.insight_template: What is currently threatening the momentum you have built in {area}?
